title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Get a GTA$1,000,000 Gift Just for Playing
content:
There’d be no player-created modes without the players to play them. Enter a GTA Online session to pick up GTA$1,000,000 between now and April 1.

Plus, earn 3X GTA$ and RP and up to GTA$1,500,000 in the Community Series over the next three weeks. We’ll be rotating the Series weekly to mix things up and give everyone a taste of the various modes on offer.

All bonuses will hit your Maze Bank account within 72 hours of logging in or completing the associated challenge.
